untranslatable_reason: Signal requires predictive modeling of mutual fund capital flows, future fund holdings, and herd behavior detection. These require external data sources (mutual fund flow data, holdings databases) and machine learning models not available in the allowed indicator set. The allowed indicators are purely technical price/volume metrics and cannot capture fund flow patterns, capital allocation predictions, or fund holding composition. Signal is fundamentally incompatible with a rules-based backtester using only OHLCV and technical indicators.
translation_notes: CHAN_AT_DRY_7 describes a front-running strategy based on predicting institutional buying/selling pressure from mutual fund flows. This requires: (1) mutual fund capital flow data (not in allowed indicators), (2) fund holdings databases (not in allowed indicators), (3) predictive model for future flows (not a static rule), and (4) correlation analysis with retail investor behavior (requires external sentiment data). No combination of technical indicators can reconstruct this signal.
